vision: A mobile app for individuals to manage daily tasks efficiently.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to create new tasks with essential details

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to create a task with a title, so that I can record what I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button Then I see a form to enter task details
Given I am on the add task form When I enter a title and save Then the task appears in my task list

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to add a due date to my task, so that I know when it needs to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a task When I tap the due date field Then I see a date picker
Given I have selected a due date When I save the task Then the due date is displayed with the task

epics.name: Task List View
epics.description: Display all tasks in an organized list format

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to view all my tasks in a list, so that I can see everything I need to do
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I am viewing the task list When tasks exist Then each task shows its title and due date

stories.title: Filter tasks by completion status
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to filter tasks by complete and incomplete, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list When I select the incomplete filter Then I see only incomplete tasks
Given I am on the task list When I select the complete filter Then I see only completed tasks
Given I am on the task list When I select all tasks filter Then I see both complete and incomplete tasks

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I tap the complete button on a task Then the task is marked as complete
Given a task is marked complete When I view the task list Then the task displays a visual completion indicator

stories.title: Unmark task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can reopen it if needed
acceptance_criteria: Given a task is marked complete When I tap the complete button again Then the task is marked as incomplete
Given I unmark a task When I view the task list Then the task no longer shows the completion indicator

epics.name: Task Deletion
epics.description: Enable users to remove tasks they no longer need

stories.title: Delete a task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove items I no longer need
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my task list When I perform the delete action on a task Then the task is removed from the list
Given I delete a task When I view the task list Then the deleted task no longer appears

stories.title: Confirm before deleting task
stories.user_story: As an Individual user, I want to confirm before deleting a task, so that I don't accidentally remove important items
acceptance_criteria: Given I tap delete on a task When the delete action is triggered Then I see a confirmation dialog
Given I see the confirmation dialog When I confirm deletion Then the task is deleted
Given I see the confirmation dialog When I cancel Then the task remains in the list
